candidate_definition_hints.text: Photometric optimization code for creating the FLAME texture space and other applications

This repository provides an analysis-by-synthesis framework to fit a textured [FLAME](http://flame.is.tue.mpg.de/) model to an image. FLAME is a lightweight generic 3D head model learned from over 33,000 head scans, but it does not come with an appearance space (see the [scienti…
